query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'bookings' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'bookings' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE
id	int	NO
hostListingId	int	NO
guestName	varchar(255)	NO
guestEmail	varchar(320)	NO
guestPhone	varchar(20)	YES
requestedDate	date	NO
mealType	enum('lunch','dinner')	NO
numberOfGuests	int	NO
specialRequests	text	YES
bookingStatus	enum('pending','confirmed','cancelled','rejected')	NO
hostNotes	text	YES
createdAt	timestamp	YES
updatedAt	timestamp	YES
paymentStatus	enum('pending','paid','refunded')	YES
totalAmount	decimal(10,2)	YES
paymentDate	timestamp	YES
stripeSessionId	varchar(255)	YES
hidden	tinyint(1)	YES
